character.definition: (same as 嶷) young kids smart and familiar with human affairs, range of mountains in Hunan Province
(same as 慠) proud; haughty; over bearing rude
big eyes, a kind of eye disease
the symbol for Cobalt, an iron (for pressing clothes)
mud, mire; to paste, to plaster
(variant of 彈) a pellet, bullet, shot, shell
